evals.name: asks-one-question-at-a-time
evals.prompt: I want to build a webhook delivery system that retries failed deliveries. help me design it
evals.expected_output: Agent asks a single clarifying question, waits for response, then asks the next one — not a wall of questions

assertions.text: First response contains exactly one question
Question is about understanding the idea (purpose, constraints, scale)
Does NOT dump multiple questions at once

evals.name: proposes-multiple-approaches
evals.prompt: I want to add full-text search to our product catalog. we have about 500K products in PostgreSQL. help me think through the options
evals.expected_output: Agent proposes 2-3 approaches (e.g., pg_trgm, Elasticsearch, Typesense) with trade-offs and a recommendation

evals.name: presents-design-in-sections
evals.prompt: I want to build a job queue system. After exploring: we need Redis-backed, supports retries with backoff, dead letter queue, priority levels, and a dashboard. Present the design.
evals.expected_output: Agent presents design in 200-300 word sections, asking for validation after each section before continuing

assertions.text: Doesn't dump the entire design at once

evals.name: applies-yagni
evals.prompt: I want to build a user settings page. It needs: theme toggle (dark/light), notification preferences, timezone selection, and also maybe in the future we might want custom CSS themes, an API for settings, webhook notifications when settings change, and SSO integration
evals.expected_output: Agent identifies the core requirements and pushes back on speculative features (custom CSS, webhooks, SSO) as YAGNI

evals.name: checks-project-context-first
evals.prompt: I want to add a caching layer to our API. help me design it
evals.expected_output: Agent reads project files (package.json, existing code, CLAUDE.md) before asking questions, to understand the tech stack and existing patterns

assertions.text: Reads project files before asking questions
References what it found in the project
Questions are informed by project context
